stories.title: View my active projects shortcut from home page dashboard
stories.description: As a brand manager, I want to have a shortcut on the home page dashboard to view my active projects, so that I can quickly access them without navigating through multiple pages.
acceptance_criteria: AC1: Given I have logged in, I should have the option to view my active projects directly from the home page dashboard.
AC2: Given I click on the 'Active Projects' shortcut, I should be taken to a page that lists all my active projects.
